dialogue.text: within the Palace...?! are they all right?!

dialogue.text: Please, just let us out the exit!!

summary: Fisher Tiger’s Legacy Is Reconsidered. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
